escalation.rationale: Houthis officially entered Iran war with missile strikes on Israel while Netanyahu announced expansion of Lebanon security zone.

ticker_items: Houthis launch first missiles at Israel since Iran war began
Netanyahu announces expansion of security zone in Lebanon
Iran threatens USS Abraham Lincoln if within range
Three journalists killed in Israeli strike in Lebanon
Russia launches ~400 drones in spring offensive against Ukraine

new_entrant.text: Yemen's Houthis officially entered the Iran war by launching ballistic missiles and drones at Israel.

eastern_europe.description: Russia continues spring offensive with drone and missile attacks on civilian areas.
Ukrainian forces struck Russian oil revenue targets in response to increased attacks.

middle_east.description: Houthis launched missiles toward Israel in their first attack since entering Iran war.
Iran attacked major aluminum plants in Gulf states including Bahrain's Alba facility.
Israeli strikes hit Beirut's southern suburbs causing smoke to billow from buildings.
Houthis launched ballistic missiles and drones at Israel in first attack since Iran war began.
Israeli air strikes hit two Hamas police checkpoints killing at least six including a child.
Israeli strike killed three journalists when their vehicle was hit.

claimed_totals.figure: 1,937 dead in Iran, 19 in Israel, 13 US soldiers, 25 in Gulf states
~1,937 dead in Iran, ~20 in Israel, ~13 US soldiers, ~26 in Gulf states

ukraine.text: Russia mapping US assets to help Iran, satellite images provided to Tehran include photos of the Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: Ukrainian President

ukraine.text: Kyiv faces a deficit of missiles as Washington is focused on its war on Iran
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President

middle_east.text: Trump wants to invade Iran to seize oil, calls US objectors 'stupid people'
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Iran, North Korea, China, and Russia—that's all one war
middle_east.speaker: Ukrainian military delegation
middle_east.title: Military officials

middle_east.text: We are expanding the security zone in Lebanon
middle_east.speaker: Benjamin Netanyahu
middle_east.title: Prime Minister

middle_east.text: Iran will never acquire nuclear weapons
middle_east.speaker: Marco Rubio
middle_east.title: Secretary of State

middle_east.text: Any U.S. troops would be on fire as soon as they arrive
middle_east.speaker: Iranian officials
middle_east.title: Government

observers.description: Pakistan hosting diplomatic discussions with Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Egypt foreign ministers in Islamabad attempting to de-escalate the Iran war. The meeting comes as Houthis joined the expanding Middle East conflict.

North Korean laborers continue brutal forced labor in Russia earning only $10 of $800 monthly wages with seized passports. Belarus announced plans to open embassy in North Korea following Lukashenko-Kim Jong-un talks and new cooperation treaty.
Prime Minister Starmer accused Trump of publicly badmouthing him in crude attempt to drag Britain into Iran war. UK refuses along with other NATO members to help with Trump's Middle East operations.
EU Sanctions Envoy expressed concern that Irish alumina products may be indirectly assisting the Russian war machine. The sale of these products may need to be banned.
Belarus announced plans to open an embassy in North Korea following talks between President Lukashenko and Kim Jong-un. The two countries signed a new treaty on friendship and cooperation.

financial.notes: Houthi threats to block Bab al-Mandeb strait could prove disastrous for global economy.

update_log.text: Rubio tells Al Jazeera that Strait of Hormuz to reopen one way or another
Al Jazeera updates Iran war casualty tracker with preliminary death toll figures
Netanyahu announces expansion of ground operations and security zone in Lebanon
Houthis launch first missile strikes at Israel since Iran war began
Three journalists killed in Israeli strike on vehicle in Jezzine Lebanon
Pentagon preparing weeks of US ground operations in Iran according to reports
Houthis officially enter Iran war with missile strikes toward Israel
Iran claims attacks on Gulf aluminum plants including Bahrain facility
Israeli strikes hit Beirut suburbs as regional conflict continues
Diplomatic talks begin in Pakistan seeking Iran conflict de-escalation
